entities.name: OIL PALM
entities.description: The primary oil-bearing crop studied in Ghana

entities.name: GHANA
entities.description: The country where the oil palm production study was conducted

entities.name: FRUIT BUNCH YIELD
entities.description: The measure of productivity based on the weight of fruit bunches produced per hectare per year

entities.name: YIELD GAP
entities.description: The difference between the potential yield and the actual yield achieved in production systems

entities.name: BOUNDARY LINE ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to determine the water-limited yield and quantify yield gaps

entities.name: WATER-LIMITED YIELD
entities.description: The maximum achievable yield under water-limited conditions

entities.name: POOR MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Factors such as incomplete crop recovery and inadequate agronomic management that reduce productivity

entities.name: INCOMPLETE CROP RECOVERY
entities.description: The failure to harvest all suitable crop, contributing to yield losses

entities.name: INADEQUATE AGRONOMIC MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Insufficient application of agricultural best practices to maintain crop health and productivity

entities.name: OIL EXTRACTION RATE
entities.description: The percentage of oil extracted from the fruit bunches

entities.name: CRUDE PALM OIL
entities.description: The raw oil extracted from oil palm fruit bunches

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMS
entities.description: Small-scale oil palm production systems managed by individual farmers

entities.name: SMALL-SCALE PROCESSORS
entities.description: Entities that process oil palm fruit with lower extraction efficiency

entities.name: LARGE-SCALE PROCESSORS
entities.description: Entities that process oil palm fruit with higher extraction efficiency
